description: Letter from ʿEli b. Yeḥezqel ha-Kohen, in Jerusalem, to Abū l-Faraj Ḥayyim (b. Shelomo, the ḥaver) and Abū l-Faraj Hiba (b. Ṣemaḥ), in al-Ramla. The sender is identified by both Goitein and Gil on the basis of handwriting; the addressees are identified by Gil. The sender urges the recipients to influence the chief qāḍī in al-Ramla, Abū l-Maʿālī, to give appropriate instructions to the qāḍī of Jerusalem, al-Tīzī, regarding a problem in Jerusalem of unclear nature. Mentions several other names, including Abū l-Munajjā Muslim, Abū Ghālib, the agent (wakīl) Abū ʿAlī Ibn al-Ṣūfī. (Information mainly from Gil and from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מירושלים ל-al-Ramla. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
